name: Knakworst with Leeks
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the ugly leaves and roots from leeks.
2. Slice diagonally into 2cm pieces; wash and drain.
3. Slice the knakworstjes into 3cm pieces.
4. Melt butter in a frying pan.
5. Add onion and cook about 2 minutes.
6. Stir in leeks, ginger, salt, and pepper; cook about 1 minute.
7. Stir in knakworstjes; cook about 2 minutes.
8. Stir in apple juice and vinegar, cover, and cook about 5 minutes,
till leeks and knakworstjes are cooked.
9. Divide over two plates.
10. Serve with stokbrood (or mashed potatoes, noodles, rice, etc.).
